defs: to do, to carry out, to perform
to cause to become, to make (into), to turn (into)
to become, to get, to grow, to be, to reach, to attain
to result in, to prove to be
force, strength, might, vigour, vigor, energy
the strength of ... people, the strength of ... men
confession of love, professing one's feelings
